description: Course Prerequisite: SPAN 2000 (Students that feel they meet the intermediate level 1 requirement can test out of this level by requesting a Spanish Language Evaluation in the Humanities Department).

requirement_sections.heading: Program Requirements
content: The Undergraduate Medical Spanish Certificate requires the following courses:
Students that have declared the Medical Spanish Certificate may take SPAN 2000 concurrently with SPAN 2600 with department approval. Transfer credits can be accepted for Spanish 2000.
items: Students that have declared the Medical Spanish Certificate may take SPAN 2000 concurrently with SPAN 2600 with department approval. Transfer credits can be accepted for Spanish 2000.
